statusLine.command: python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); model=d.get('model',{}).get('display_name',''); total_in=d.get('context_window',{}).get('total_input_tokens',0); total_out=d.get('context_window',{}).get('total_output_tokens',0); used_pct=d.get('context_window',{}).get('used_percentage'); agent=d.get('agent',{}).get('name'); in_k=(total_in+500)//1000; out_k=(total_out+500)//1000; status=f'{model} | In:{in_k}k Out:{out_k}k'; status+=f' | Context:{used_pct}%' if used_pct else ''; status+=f' | Agent:{agent}' if agent else ''; print(status)"
